governing_evidence.use: Authoritative B2/B6 cardinality, validation, and no-analysis boundary
Collection placement, duration, and device provenance
Authoritative A2-4 missing-input finding and minimum resolution

anchor_sources.note: The retained FoleyBench tables do not contain event timestamps. UCS is clip metadata, not an event-level truth label.

anchor_sources.method: Frame difference plus Farneback motion energy; positive derivative peaks; half-FWHM uncertainty
anchor_sources.gap: Candidates are not attached to a specified semantic event. V2 must adjudicate an event ID and retain an interval, not promote the top salience point automatically.
It detects the original audio track and is outside the approved metadata-to-visual-to-human chain. It cannot serve as the v2 visible-event anchor without a new PI decision.
The raw mark file is absent, so the aggregate cannot be row-audited or converted into v2 anchor intervals. Recover the original labels or re-annotate event IDs and intervals.

implemented_old_contracts.presence: clip-level RMS gate plus maximum event-class probability
implemented_old_contracts.timing: first spectral-flux onset in an absolute clip-time bin
implemented_old_contracts.class: event-restricted PANNs top class with cross-group abstention margin
implemented_old_contracts.material: unit-normalized CLAP embedding consumed through raw cosine

assets.gap: Presence, Timing, and Material implement the superseded operational predicates; Binding has never been implemented.

assets.use: Visual event annotation, conditioning replay, and development/confirmatory candidate selection

assets.gap: Its clip-level labels and old anchor/bin contract are not event-level v2 annotations.

gaps: Class rows contain labels but no 527-way or coarse posterior
Presence and Timing are old clip-level operational definitions
Material rows do not encode a matched 2AFC decision

assets.resolution: Regenerate only the journaled trajectories/finals required by a frozen v2 task, into a new immutable output root.

assets.gap: No full tokens, latent, velocity, Tweedie latent, conditioning tokens, external-preview representation, or lineage-equivalent fp32 pooled reference.
It is one clip-level cached representation per historical clip, not the complete network-consumed conditioning-token lineage required by v2.

These gate-specific arrays are not a complete, per-generation posterior store for every historical or banked cohort. They do not remove the need to regenerate finals where v2 requires reselectable posteriors.
Old axis semantics and missing source audio prevent direct v2 remeasurement.
Material `correct` is only own-target cosine. Candidate preview WAVs and candidate/reference embeddings were not retained.

assets.allowed_goal2_use: Measure banked base/fork WAVs under frozen v2 semantics; replay only representations not retained as WAVs.

assets.pair_contract: donor_not_source by cached confident class label; source, donor, and eight swap WAVs
assets.allowed_goal1_action: Define inherited v2 measurement fields and semantics only
assets.forbidden_action: Open, measure, aggregate, or analyze swap audio in this phase

assets.resolution: Run the signed identity pilot; recollect same-forward fp32 lineage after PASS. Do not use these bundles for a scientific probe.

assets.gap: The sidecars predate event-centered v2 Presence/Timing/Material/Binding. A summary is not a substitute for a new blinded human-ready package when the required per-event fields do not join.

assets.goal2_weight_source: hf local-only until a populated ModelScope mirror is separately recorded

source_inputs: journaled tag, cfg, alpha, schedule, step count, duration, subject/fork index, and progress
MMAudio code commit and exact local weight hashes
explicit environment, dtype, CUDA determinism, and PYTHONHASHSEED

phase1_rng_contract.algorithm: numpy.default_rng(SeedSequence([seed, crc32(str(part)) for part in parts]))

historical_p1cfg1_contract.conditioning: full video CLIP plus Synchformer plus empty text

path_for_missing_class_posteriors: Recreate the exact journaled independent/final identity using the registered RNG and configuration.
Write the regenerated final to a new immutable Goal-2 RunStore; never overwrite historical directories.
Run the pinned PANNs tagger and persist the complete 527-way clipwise_output, coarse posterior, decision diagnostics, abstention threshold version, audio SHA256, and generation ID.
Fail the unit on any missing video/hash/config/weight/join; do not infer a posterior from the old label.
deterministic_regeneration.validation: A completion manifest must bind input video, source journal, code/config/model hashes, RNG parts, audio hash, posterior shape/dtype, and output hash. Cross-hardware numerical differences are measured and reported; they are never hidden by replacing an existing value.

existing_phase2_population.legacy_value: scalar cosine to own ODE-final embedding

reusable_inputs.available_disjoint_same_video_final_pool: 16 material embeddings per clip in the Phase-1 measurement journal

missing_inputs: 6,400 regenerated intermediate preview WAVs or equivalent deterministic replay packets
a frozen positive-reference assignment using a disjoint same-video/same-event generation
a frozen different-video negative manifest matched on coarse class, anchor timing, and loudness and documented as different material
persisted positive and negative embeddings with reference IDs
matching covariates, relaxation level, and exclusion reason
a2_4_material_fix.replay_contract: Regenerate p1cfg1 independent subjects j=0..3 with the historical seed/config, decode Tweedie previews at the eight registered progress points, and persist output in a new immutable Goal-2 root.
persist_per_example: candidate, positive, and negative audio SHA256 or immutable replay reference
all three IDs and model revision
legacy own-target cosine side by side
prohibited_shortcuts: Selecting a negative after viewing the candidate margin
Using the candidate's own contribution in its positive reference
Estimating a missing embedding from the legacy scalar cosine

b6_measurement_semantics_inheritance.rule: A later causal phase must apply the same signed Axis Specification v2 schemas to source, donor, and swap audio. This audit does not measure B6.
minimum_inherited_fields: Timing onset offset and defined/undefined reason
full Class posterior and confident/abstain state
Material embedding plus frozen source/donor nearest-reference margins
Binding event-set presence, order, assignment, and ambiguity fields
measurer/spec/model revisions and reference manifest hashes
b6_measurement_semantics_inheritance.required_before_later_measurement: Curate event identities and anchors for both clips in every pair, freeze all references and ambiguity rules, then record a separate quarantine-release amendment.

blocking_gaps.impact: Presence, Timing, Material, and Binding cannot be interpreted event-centrically from the existing salience-ranked points alone.
blocking_gaps.resolution: Curate stable event IDs and visible anchor intervals with provenance/uncertainty on development, B2, and two-event candidate clips.

blocking_gaps.impact: The old 30-clip aggregate decision cannot be row-audited or upgraded to intervals.
blocking_gaps.resolution: Recover results/labeling/labels_anchor_v1.jsonl or repeat blinded event-ID/interval annotation.

blocking_gaps.impact: The 60-clip list is not a scored Binding cohort.
blocking_gaps.resolution: Curate two events, two anchors, per-event presence, correct assignment, and ambiguity for each admitted clip.
Freeze references, replay the existing 6,400 Phase-2 cells, and persist all three embeddings and IDs.

blocking_gaps.impact: Historical class labels cannot support new abstention thresholds for every required cohort.
blocking_gaps.resolution: Deterministically regenerate only required journaled finals and persist full posteriors.

blocking_gaps.impact: No internal-readout probe may be fit from the existing retap collection.
blocking_gaps.resolution: Run the signed same-forward identity pilot and recollect after the gate passes.

blocking_gaps.impact: The 79,152 banked WAVs cannot yet be measured.
blocking_gaps.resolution: Both PIs sign the Axis Specification v2 and an amendment records measurement-only release.

audit_conclusion: The banked B2 audio is the primary reusable Goal-2 measurement asset after signed release. Historical journals preserve exact Class auditability and many Material final embeddings, but event-level anchors, reselectable Class posteriors, Phase-2 candidate/reference embeddings, and lineage-valid internal features must be newly materialized. B6 remains preserved and unmeasured.
